description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark wooden frame and four straight legs, featuring a smooth, matte-finished surface. The desktop is equipped with a large computer monitor on a stand, a wireless keyboard, a mouse, a tablet on a stand, and a ceramic mug, all arranged neatly. The desk surface appears to have a two-tone design, with a central gray inlay or mat contrasting with the darker wood border. The front edge of the desk is clean and unadorned, while the back shows the rear of the monitor and tablet. The desk is of standard height, suitable for sitting and working, and does not have any visible drawers or shelves. The overall appearance is sleek, professional, and well-suited for an office or home study environment.
description: A sleek, modern dark wood desk with a gray inlay, supporting a computer, tablet, keyboard, mouse, and mug. The design is minimalist and professional, ideal for a workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desktop setup with monitor, keyboard, mouse, tablet, and mug clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, the mug's position, and the thin profile of the monitor and tablet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and tablet, with the mug and keyboard partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the desk's length and the arrangement of objects along the surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the keyboard, mouse, and monitor arranged for direct access, while the back features the rear of the monitor and tablet.
